caption: The video appears to be a segment from a show called "FOCUS with Margaret Harrington," featuring a discussion on climate crisis poems titled "No More Time" by Greg Delanty. The split-screen format shows two individuals engaged in conversation. On the left, a woman is seen listening attentively and occasionally speaking, while on the right, a man with glasses and a beard is actively discussing the topic. The background of the woman's setting includes some decorative elements like string lights, suggesting a cozy indoor environment, whereas the man's background features a blue wall with framed pictures and an "OPEN" sign, indicating a more formal or professional setting. The overall tone of the video seems to be informative and focused on addressing the urgency of the climate crisis through poetry.
